args.query: SELECT Id, OrderId, Product2Id FROM OrderItem WHERE OrderId IN (SELECT Id FROM "Order" WHERE AccountId = '#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' AND EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-15' AND EffectiveDate < '2021-07-15');

args.query: SELECT oi.Product2Id as Product2Id, p.Name as ProductName FROM OrderItem oi JOIN "Order" o ON oi.OrderId = o.Id JOIN Product2 p ON oi.Product2Id = p.Id WHERE o.AccountId = '#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' AND o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01';

exec_args.sql: SELECT oi.Product2Id as Product2Id, p.Name as ProductName FROM OrderItem oi JOIN "Order" o ON oi.OrderId = o.Id JOIN Product2 p ON oi.Product2Id = p.Id WHERE o.AccountId = '#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' AND o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01';
